# COL-50BA42D348AA

> v4.1 implementation audit found that a v3.1 rollback reader can silently reactivate inactive lifecycle records. The release rehearsal now fails closed whenever inactive claim/source records exist until an explicit migration or v4.1-compatible rollback reader preserves lifecycle semantics.
